creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
I suggest continuing the 14.0 discussion under bug 270189: 

> emulators/virtualbox-ose: guest machines are no longer usable: 
> Failed to construct device 'VMMDev' instance #0 (VERR_INTERNAL_ERROR_3).

14.0-CURRENT is specified there in bug 270189 comment 0.
